description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages test and build using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/mbarkhau/straitjacket/base for the lint and unit jobs. In the test stage add a lint job that runs make lint then make mypy, does not allow failure, and stores the reports/mypycov/ directory and the JUnit report reports/flake8.xml as artifacts. Also in the test stage add a unit job that runs make test, does not allow failure, captures the JUnit report reports/pytest.xml and the coverage reports in reports/testcov/, and extracts coverage using the regex /^(TOTAL|src).*?(\d+\%)$/. In the build stage add a pages job that runs mkdir -p public/cov, mkdir -p public/mypycov, copies reports/testcov/* to public/cov/, copies reports/mypycov/* to public/mypycov/, publishes the public directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
